screenshots.note: Puppeteer unavailable in worker environment. Visual review based on code analysis + prior screenshots.

carry_over_verification.bare_localStorage_fixed: VERIFIED — all localStorage access now uses safeSave/safeRead from utils/safeSave.js. No bare localStorage.getItem or .setItem calls remain in src/.
carry_over_verification.handleTabKeyDown_fixed: VERIFIED — wrapped in useCallback with tabRef pattern. No stale closure. Tab buttons get stable function reference.
carry_over_verification.ErrorBoundary_fixed: VERIFIED — has resetError method and Retry button.
carry_over_verification.ARIA_radiogroup_nav: VERIFIED — both activity filter bars have onKeyDown with ArrowRight/ArrowLeft navigation.

suggestions.title: JSON.parse on vibe history unguarded after safeSave migration
suggestions.description: App.jsx vibe useEffect: `const history = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : []` — safeRead guards against localStorage throwing but NOT corrupt JSON. If stored value is malformed, JSON.parse throws SyntaxError, entire useEffect aborts — vibe streak, sparkline, and transition quotes all silently break. The old try/catch accidentally protected this. Fix: wrap in try/catch or add safeParseJSON utility.

suggestions.title: Error-status workers invisible on Office floor
suggestions.description: Office.jsx filters workers into workingWorkers (status=working) and idleWorkers (status=idle). Error workers match neither — they're in activeIds so excluded from ghostRoster too. Result: office goes red/on-fire but the erroring worker is completely absent from the floor. All the error animations (char--glitch, WORKER_ERROR_BUBBLES, error desk screen SVGs) exist but never render. Fix: add error workers to deskOccupants after working workers.

suggestions.title: VIBE_LABELS object created inside useEffect on every vibe change
suggestions.description: App.jsx vibe useEffect declares `const VIBE_LABELS = {...}` — a static mapping recreated every vibe transition. Move to module scope alongside VIBE_COLORS/VIBE_RANK.

suggestions.title: ShortcutToast has no dismiss button for mouse/touch users
suggestions.description: Toast can only be dismissed by keyboard shortcut or waiting 7s. No click/tap dismiss. On mobile it overlays content with no escape. Add a close button or suppress on touch devices entirely (shortcuts are irrelevant on mobile).

suggestions.title: Footer quote cycle permanently skips vibe-reactive tagline
suggestions.description: quoteBonus wraps from BONUS_TAGLINES.length back to 1, never returning to 0 (the vibe-specific tagline). After first click, vibe taglines are permanently bypassed.

suggestions.title: isTouchDevice snapshot at module load vs live matchMedia in Office
suggestions.description: App.jsx evaluates isTouchDevice once at module load. Office.jsx checks matchMedia live at click time. Inconsistency — header pill shows stale text on convertible devices.

suggestions.title: Dead WORKER_CONFETTI_PIECES comment
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 39-40: migration-era comment about removed code. Delete it.

verified_fixes: safeSave/safeRead migration complete — no bare localStorage calls remain
handleTabKeyDown properly memoized with useCallback + tabRef
ARIA radiogroup keyboard navigation working on both filter bars
summary: QA #85: Score stable at 4.4/5. All 4 HIGH items from prior reviews VERIFIED FIXED. 2 MEDIUMs remain (unguarded JSON.parse, invisible error workers on office floor), 5 LOWs carry over. No new issues found — codebase is in good shape.
